event.name: UTSAV - 2025
event.description: Utsav 2025 is where the youth of Indore come together to celebrate growth, good energy, and the joy of becoming the best version of ourselves. Curated by Motivata, this event is built for everyone who wants more—from life, from themselves, and from the world around them. On 21st December at Essentia Orion Lawn, Utsav turns one evening into a complete experience: powerful self-growth sessions, real conversations, live music, meditation, networking with passionate people, and a massive attempt at three world records.

pricingTiers.name: Individual Pass
pricingTiers.shortDescription:
Get complete access to UTSAV 2025 with all activities, sessions, and exclusive experiences.

Access to complete event and all the 7 activities
Access to SOS session + speakers sessions + DJ + live music + Doer's Networking Zone
Get participation certification for 3 world records
Gain clarity, build actionable goals and enroll in community challenges & collaborative opportunities
Experience live group meditation on World Meditation Day

pricingTiers.name: Group Pass (4 Members)
pricingTiers.shortDescription:
Bring your squad! Get the best value with our group pass for 4 people.

All Individual Pass benefits for 4 members
Priority seating for speaker sessions
Exclusive group networking opportunities
Group photo with event speakers
Special group activities access
